summary: Iteration 4: Tested new Compliance Metrics Panel (Panel de Métricas de Cumplimiento) feature. All backend endpoints working correctly. All frontend components load and display correctly. Score shows 0% with 'critico' level as expected (0 cumplidas, 4 vencidas out of 14 total obligations).
passed_tests: GET /api/cumplimiento returns score, nivel, resumen, chart_mensual, desglose_tipo, tendencia, proximas_vencer
GET /api/cumplimiento/pdf returns valid PDF file with correct headers
Cumplimiento endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
Score calculation verified: 0% (0 cumplidas / 4 past obligations)
Cumplimiento page (/cumplimiento) loads with all components
Summary cards show: 14 Total, 0 Cumplidas, 10 Pendientes, 0 En Proceso, 4 Vencidas, 0 Omitidas
Monthly compliance chart (Cumplimiento por Mes) renders with 12 months
Trend chart (Tendencia del Score) renders with 6 months history
Type breakdown (Desglose por Tipo) shows 3 obligation types with progress bars
Upcoming deadlines (Próximas a Vencer) shows 'Aviso LFPIORPI - Abril' with 24 days remaining
'Descargar Reporte PDF' button present and opens PDF in new tab
Dashboard shows compliance mini-widget with 0% score and '0 de 14 obligaciones cumplidas (4 vencidas)'
Clicking compliance widget on Dashboard navigates to /cumplimiento
Sidebar navigation includes 'Cumplimiento' link with ShieldCheck icon
Info banner 'Reporte para Auditores' displays at bottom of page
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 tested the new Compliance Metrics Panel feature. Backend endpoints /api/cumplimiento and /api/cumplimiento/pdf work correctly. Frontend CumplimientoPage displays score circle, summary cards, monthly chart, trend chart, type breakdown, and upcoming deadlines. Dashboard shows compliance mini-widget that links to /cumplimiento. Sidebar has 'Cumplimiento' nav link. Test organization has 14 obligations (0 cumplidas, 10 pendientes, 4 vencidas) resulting in 0% score with 'critico' level.

mocked_apis.CFDI_PAC_Integration: CFDI timbrado (stamping) is MOCKED - returns simulated UUID
mocked_apis.Email_Notifications: Email notifications MOCKED - RESEND_API_KEY not configured

dashboard_widget.location: Dashboard page between charts and Quick Actions
dashboard_widget.displays: Score percentage, obligations summary, link to /cumplimiento
